blockingIssues.description: RE-RUN (round 3): No new commits or fix features since round 2. The feature produced NO git commits. All work stored in gitignored .desloppify/state-go.json. Defer rationale preserved only in transcript skeleton, not in git-tracked files.
RE-RUN (round 3): No new commits or fix features since round 2. Feature produced NO git commits. All work stored in gitignored .desloppify/state-go.json. Same persistent systemic issue as round 2.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance for 'review-only' or 'analysis' features: When no source code changes are needed but defer rationale must be documented, workers should create or update a milestone-specific review document (e.g., .factory/validation/<milestone>/review-notes.md) to preserve findings in git.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both review-structural-issues and improve-responsibility-cohesion correctly analyzed findings but preserved only in gitignored desloppify state and transcript skeletons. Milestone-1 synthesis for cleanup-unused-t1 already flagged this issue - it remains systemic across multiple milestones.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add boundary: quality improvement features (desloppify triage, structural review) are NOT appropriate for go-cli-worker skill. These features analyze existing code quality and should not expect CLI contract verification. The go-cli-worker skill procedure (write failing tests first, verify JSON mode) does not apply.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both milestone-2 features used go-cli-worker skill for desloppify analysis tasks. Neither performed CLI contract work or JSON mode verification. Skill mismatch was already noted in milestone-1 synthesis.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify 'Commit Hygiene' section: Workers should verify `git status` shows actual source code changes before claiming a feature is complete. If only .desloppify/ state files were modified (gitignored), the feature has NOT produced a durable artifact.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both features modified only gitignored .desloppify/state-go.json. Handoffs incorrectly claimed commit e9398e7 which is unrelated. Workers should be trained to verify their own git history.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance: If feature description involves desloppify analysis (structural, cohesion, boilerplate, unused), this is NOT a CLI contract feature. Workers should NOT run CLI contract verification steps (JSON mode, command signature tests) unless explicitly required.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features review-structural-issues and improve-responsibility-cohesion are desloppify analysis tasks but used go-cli-worker. Transcript shows no CLI testing performed.

rejectedObservations.observation: Suggestion to modify .desloppify/ state file to be git-tracked
rejectedObservations.reason: Ambiguous - changing .gitignore for desloppify state would affect local development workflow, not within this team's scope to change desloppify tool behavior
